terms.memorize: Uses a private key over a hash to prove integrity, authenticity, and non-repudiation.

terms.memorize: One-way fixed-length digest used for integrity verification, not confidentiality.
terms.explanation: Hashing detects changes and stores password verifiers when salted and stretched. It does not encrypt because it cannot be decrypted.

topics.summary: Facility controls that delay, detect, deter, or prevent unauthorized physical access.

terms.memorize: Post or barrier that stops vehicles from approaching buildings or sensitive areas.
terms.explanation: Post or barrier that stops vehicles from approaching buildings or sensitive areas. Exam concept: Physical deterrent/preventive control against vehicle ramming and unauthorized parking.

terms.memorize: Two-door entry area that permits only one person or group through at a time.
terms.explanation: Two-door entry area that permits only one person or group through at a time. Exam concept: Also called a mantrap; prevents tailgating and supports identity verification.

terms.memorize: Perimeter barrier used to deter and delay unauthorized access.
terms.explanation: Perimeter barrier used to deter and delay unauthorized access. Exam concept: Often paired with lighting, cameras, and guards.

terms.memorize: Cameras used to monitor and record activity.
terms.explanation: Cameras used to monitor and record activity. Exam concept: Primarily detective and deterrent; supports investigations.

terms.memorize: Human physical control that deters, monitors, and responds to access attempts.
terms.explanation: Human physical control that deters, monitors, and responds to access attempts. Exam concept: Can validate badges and handle exceptions.

terms.memorize: Physical or electronic credential used for facility entry.
terms.explanation: Physical or electronic credential used for facility entry. Exam concept: Lost badges should be disabled immediately.

terms.memorize: Detects heat or motion using infrared energy.
terms.explanation: Detects heat or motion using infrared energy. Exam concept: Used for intrusion detection in physical spaces.
Detects weight or pressure changes. Exam concept: Can identify footsteps, vehicle presence, or object removal.

topics.summary: Core cloud models, shared responsibility, containers, and virtualized infrastructure controls.

terms.memorize: Infrastructure as a Service provides virtual machines, storage, and networking while the customer manages OS and applications.
terms.explanation: Infrastructure as a Service provides virtual machines, storage, and networking while the customer manages OS and applications. Exam concept: Customer has more security responsibility than with PaaS or SaaS.

terms.memorize: Platform as a Service provides managed runtime and development platform.
terms.explanation: Platform as a Service provides managed runtime and development platform. Exam concept: Customer usually secures application code, data, identities, and configurations.

terms.memorize: Software as a Service provides complete application functionality managed by provider.
terms.explanation: Software as a Service provides complete application functionality managed by provider. Exam concept: Customer focuses on identity, data, access, and configuration.

terms.memorize: Cloud security responsibilities are split between provider and customer.
terms.explanation: Cloud security responsibilities are split between provider and customer. Exam concept: Exact split depends on IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, and contractual terms.

terms.memorize: Cloud Access Security Broker enforces policy between users and cloud services.
terms.explanation: Cloud Access Security Broker enforces policy between users and cloud services. Exam concept: Supports visibility, DLP, access control, and shadow IT discovery.

terms.memorize: Lightweight isolated application runtime sharing the host OS kernel.
terms.explanation: Lightweight isolated application runtime sharing the host OS kernel. Exam concept: Secure with trusted images, minimal privileges, scanning, and runtime controls.
Template used to create containers. Exam concept: Images should be signed, scanned, and pulled from trusted registries.

terms.memorize: Container orchestration platform for deployment, scaling, and management.
terms.explanation: Container orchestration platform for deployment, scaling, and management. Exam concept: Secure RBAC, secrets, network policies, and API access.

terms.memorize: Software/firmware layer that runs and isolates virtual machines.
terms.explanation: Software/firmware layer that runs and isolates virtual machines. Exam concept: Type 1 runs on hardware; Type 2 runs on a host OS.

terms.memorize: Attack where code breaks isolation from guest VM to host or another VM.
terms.explanation: Attack where code breaks isolation from guest VM to host or another VM. Exam concept: Mitigate with patching, isolation, and hardened hypervisors.

topics.summary: Segmentation, secure access, and network security devices used to protect enterprise traffic.

terms.memorize: Network Access Control checks identity and posture before allowing network access.
terms.explanation: Network Access Control checks identity and posture before allowing network access. Exam concept: Can quarantine noncompliant devices or assign restricted VLANs.

terms.memorize: Virtual LAN segments broadcast domains logically on switches.
terms.explanation: Virtual LAN segments broadcast domains logically on switches. Exam concept: Used for segmentation but must be paired with ACLs/firewalls for strong control.

terms.memorize: Screened subnet that exposes public services while separating them from internal networks.
terms.explanation: Screened subnet that exposes public services while separating them from internal networks. Exam concept: Common placement for web, mail, and reverse proxy services.

terms.memorize: Web Application Firewall filters HTTP/S traffic for application-layer attacks.
terms.explanation: Web Application Firewall filters HTTP/S traffic for application-layer attacks. Exam concept: Useful against SQL injection, XSS, and other web payloads.

terms.memorize: Proxy that receives client requests and forwards them to backend servers.
terms.explanation: Proxy that receives client requests and forwards them to backend servers. Exam concept: Can provide TLS termination, load balancing, and security filtering.

terms.memorize: Proxy that represents internal clients when they access external resources.
terms.explanation: Proxy that represents internal clients when they access external resources. Exam concept: Supports web filtering, logging, and egress control.

terms.memorize: Hardened intermediary host used to administer sensitive systems.
terms.explanation: Hardened intermediary host used to administer sensitive systems. Exam concept: Reduces direct administrative exposure.

terms.memorize: Software-defined WAN centrally manages wide-area connectivity and path selection.
terms.explanation: Software-defined WAN centrally manages wide-area connectivity and path selection. Exam concept: Often combines performance routing with security policy.

terms.memorize: Security device decrypts, inspects, and re-encrypts TLS traffic.
terms.explanation: Security device decrypts, inspects, and re-encrypts TLS traffic. Exam concept: Requires enterprise trust deployment and privacy/legal consideration.

topics.summary: Application security practices across design, coding, testing, deployment, and maintenance.

terms.memorize: Software Development Life Cycle organizes planning, design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance.
terms.explanation: Software Development Life Cycle organizes planning, design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance. Exam concept: Security should be integrated into each phase.

terms.memorize: Integrates security controls and testing into DevOps pipelines.
terms.explanation: Integrates security controls and testing into DevOps pipelines. Exam concept: Goal is continuous, automated security without slowing delivery unnecessarily.

terms.memorize: Static Application Security Testing analyzes source or bytecode without running the app.
terms.explanation: Static Application Security Testing analyzes source or bytecode without running the app. Exam concept: Finds coding flaws early in development.

terms.memorize: Dynamic Application Security Testing tests a running application from the outside.
terms.explanation: Dynamic Application Security Testing tests a running application from the outside. Exam concept: Finds runtime and configuration issues.

terms.memorize: Interactive Application Security Testing analyzes an application while it runs with instrumentation.
terms.explanation: Interactive Application Security Testing analyzes an application while it runs with instrumentation. Exam concept: Combines runtime context with code-level insight.

terms.memorize: Feeds unexpected, malformed, or random input to find crashes and flaws.
terms.explanation: Feeds unexpected, malformed, or random input to find crashes and flaws. Exam concept: Useful for input validation and memory-safety testing.

terms.memorize: Development practice that prevents common vulnerabilities through validation, safe APIs, and least privilege.
terms.explanation: Development practice that prevents common vulnerabilities through validation, safe APIs, and least privilege. Exam concept: Mapped to OWASP and internal coding standards.

terms.memorize: Manual or automated review of source code to find defects and security issues.
terms.explanation: Manual or automated review of source code to find defects and security issues. Exam concept: Can be peer review or tool-assisted.

terms.memorize: Automated build, test, and deployment workflow.
terms.explanation: Automated build, test, and deployment workflow. Exam concept: Secure with signed artifacts, secrets management, and security gates.

topics.summary: Data and context about threats, actors, indicators, and attacker behavior.

terms.memorize: Open-source intelligence gathered from public sources.
terms.explanation: Open-source intelligence gathered from public sources. Exam concept: Useful for enrichment, reconnaissance awareness, and external threat context.

terms.memorize: Structured Threat Information Expression standardizes threat intelligence representation.
terms.explanation: Structured Threat Information Expression standardizes threat intelligence representation. Exam concept: Defines objects such as indicators, malware, and attack patterns.

terms.memorize: Trusted Automated Exchange of Intelligence Information transports threat intelligence.
terms.explanation: Trusted Automated Exchange of Intelligence Information transports threat intelligence. Exam concept: Often used to exchange STIX data between systems.

terms.memorize: Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures describe how attackers operate.
terms.explanation: Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures describe how attackers operate. Exam concept: Mapped by frameworks such as MITRE ATT&CK.

terms.memorize: Indicator of Attack shows behavior suggesting an attack is in progress.
terms.explanation: Indicator of Attack shows behavior suggesting an attack is in progress. Exam concept: More behavior-focused than IOC.

terms.memorize: Stream of indicators or intelligence from internal or external sources.
terms.explanation: Stream of indicators or intelligence from internal or external sources. Exam concept: Should be validated and tuned to reduce false positives.

terms.memorize: Community or sector group that exchanges threat intelligence.
terms.explanation: Community or sector group that exchanges threat intelligence. Exam concept: Examples include ISAC-style sharing groups.

topics.summary: Evidence collection, preservation, and analysis practices used during investigations.

terms.memorize: Bit-for-bit copy of storage media used for analysis while preserving original evidence.
terms.explanation: Bit-for-bit copy of storage media used for analysis while preserving original evidence. Exam concept: Validate with hashes before and after imaging.

terms.memorize: Device or tool that prevents modification of evidence media during acquisition.
terms.explanation: Device or tool that prevents modification of evidence media during acquisition. Exam concept: Protects evidence integrity.
Capture of volatile RAM contents. Exam concept: Useful for malware, encryption keys, processes, and network artifacts.

terms.memorize: Comparing hashes to prove evidence or files did not change.
terms.explanation: Comparing hashes to prove evidence or files did not change. Exam concept: Supports integrity and chain-of-custody documentation.

terms.memorize: Process preserving relevant data when litigation or investigation is anticipated.
terms.explanation: Process preserving relevant data when litigation or investigation is anticipated. Exam concept: Suspends normal deletion or retention workflows.

terms.memorize: Identification, preservation, collection, and production of electronically stored information.
terms.explanation: Identification, preservation, collection, and production of electronically stored information. Exam concept: Often related to legal and compliance investigations.

topics.summary: Ongoing control of accounts, permissions, and privileged access.

terms.memorize: Privileged Access Management controls and monitors high-risk administrative accounts.
terms.explanation: Privileged Access Management controls and monitors high-risk administrative accounts. Exam concept: Includes vaulting, approval workflows, session recording, and just-in-time access.

terms.memorize: Just-in-time access grants privileges temporarily when needed.
terms.explanation: Just-in-time access grants privileges temporarily when needed. Exam concept: Reduces standing privilege and supports least privilege.

terms.memorize: Periodic validation that users still need assigned permissions.
terms.explanation: Periodic validation that users still need assigned permissions. Exam concept: Helps detect privilege creep and orphaned access.

terms.memorize: Splits sensitive tasks across multiple people or roles.
terms.explanation: Splits sensitive tasks across multiple people or roles. Exam concept: Reduces fraud and error risk.

terms.memorize: Periodically changes duties to reduce dependency and detect irregularities.
terms.explanation: Periodically changes duties to reduce dependency and detect irregularities. Exam concept: Administrative control for insider-risk reduction.

terms.memorize: Requires absence so another person performs the role and anomalies may surface.
terms.explanation: Requires absence so another person performs the role and anomalies may surface. Exam concept: Common fraud-detection administrative control.

topics.summary: Compliance, privacy, and governance concepts commonly tested in Security+ scenarios.

terms.memorize: Personally Identifiable Information can identify, contact, or locate an individual.
terms.explanation: Personally Identifiable Information can identify, contact, or locate an individual. Exam concept: Protect using classification, access control, encryption, and minimization.

terms.memorize: Protected Health Information is health-related data tied to an individual.
terms.explanation: Protected Health Information is health-related data tied to an individual. Exam concept: Commonly associated with healthcare privacy requirements.

terms.memorize: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard applies to cardholder data environments.
terms.explanation: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard applies to cardholder data environments. Exam concept: Focuses on protecting payment card data.

terms.memorize: General Data Protection Regulation governs personal data protection for EU/EEA data subjects.
terms.explanation: General Data Protection Regulation governs personal data protection for EU/EEA data subjects. Exam concept: Exam clue: data subject rights, lawful basis, breach notification, cross-border transfer.

terms.memorize: Entity that determines why and how personal data is processed.
terms.explanation: Entity that determines why and how personal data is processed. Exam concept: Contrast with processor, which processes data on behalf of controller.

terms.memorize: Entity that processes personal data on behalf of a controller.
terms.explanation: Entity that processes personal data on behalf of a controller. Exam concept: Responsibilities are usually defined by contract and regulation.

terms.memorize: Privacy right to request deletion of personal data under qualifying conditions.
terms.explanation: Privacy right to request deletion of personal data under qualifying conditions. Exam concept: Common GDPR-style privacy concept.
